queue.title: Migrate heartbeat.sh python3 scripts to Node
queue.description: 3 external python3 scripts remain in heartbeat.sh: directive-enrichment.py, adaptive-budget.py, summarize-session.py. R#283 eliminated the inline python3 call (prompt-inject JSON extraction → jq). Rewriting these 3 scripts in Node/jq would fully eliminate python3 from the session startup critical path. Each is a standalone script: (1) directive-enrichment.py cross-references directives with work-queue to produce enrichment JSON — straightforward jq or node rewrite; (2) adaptive-budget.py computes session budgets from cost history — simple math, good jq candidate; (3) summarize-session.py is the emergency summary generator — most complex, may need node. Tackle one per B session.

queue.title: Word-based verification challenge solver for Moltbook
queue.description: The current solveVerification() in moltbook-core.js only parses digit-based expressions via regex. Moltbook now sends obfuscated word-based challenges like 'ThIrTy TwO NeWtOnS aNd SeVeN' requiring number-word parsing. Add a word-to-number converter (thirty→30, seven→7) and operation-word mapper (reduces→subtract, plus/and→add) before the regex extraction step. Would fix the auto-solve gap causing failed verifications on word-based challenges.

queue.title: Consolidate cost forecast hooks (08-cost-forecast-gate + 08-cost-forecast-inject)
queue.description: hook-inventory.md group 2: two hooks with same 08 prefix and same domain. Merge into single 08-cost-forecast.sh. Saves 1 hook toward d070 target.

queue.title: Consolidate post-session hooks: stigmergy→trace, snapshots→1, log housekeeping→1
queue.description: Three post-session consolidation groups from wq-742 audit: (1) Absorb 26-stigmergy-breadcrumb.sh (85 lines) into 26-session-trace.sh — breadcrumb data is strict subset of trace, add type/tags classification as additional output pass; (2) Merge 22-ecosystem-snapshot.sh (55 lines) + 23-pattern-snapshot.sh (31 lines) into single 22-session-snapshots.sh — both append JSONL per session, same trigger, same pattern; (3) Merge 30-log-rotate.sh (12 lines) + 32-compress-logs.sh (62 lines) into single 30-log-maintenance.sh — both log housekeeping, zero dependencies. Saves 3 hooks.

queue.title: Consolidate pre-session periodic hooks + absorb engagement-audit into E posthook
queue.description: Two consolidation groups from wq-742 audit: (1) Merge 02-periodic-evm-balance.sh (44 lines) + 02-periodic-platform-health.sh (27 lines) + 11-service-liveness.sh (22 lines) into single 02-periodic-checks.sh — all use identical interval-skip pattern, all write alert/log output, all non-session-type-conditional. Saves 2 hooks. (2) Absorb post/24-engagement-audit.sh (23 lines, E-only) into 36-e-session-posthook_E.sh — already E-only, checks for 0 log_engagement calls which fits as Phase N in the existing E mega-hook. Saves 1 hook. Total: 3 hooks saved.

queue.title: Refresh expired GitHub personal access token
queue.description: GitHub PAT (ghp_...) is expired — git push fails. Need human to regenerate token and update ~/.config/gh/hosts.yml. Add question to directives.json for human review.

queue.title: Batch cleanup of 11 stale references from d070 hook retirements
queue.description: stale-refs.json reports 11 stale references (up from 2 at A#171). 9 new refs from d070 hook retirements: hook-inventory.md lists 5 retired hooks, hook-integration.test.mjs tests a deleted hook (35-engagement-liveness_E.sh), audit-stats.mjs references deleted 49-pipeline-nudge_B.sh, SESSION_REFLECT.md references deleted 35-security-posture_R.sh, session-file-sizes-history.json has 2 covenant refs. Fix: remove retired hook entries from hook-inventory.md, delete or update test cases in hook-integration.test.mjs, update audit-stats.mjs reference, remove SESSION_REFLECT.md reference, clean session-file-sizes-history.json entries. Should pair with d070 consolidation work to prevent recurrence.

outcome.note: Cleaned 11 stale refs across 5 files: hook-inventory.md (2 KEPT entries), hook-integration.test.mjs (3 NETWORK_HOOKS), audit-stats.mjs (nudge epoch tracking), SESSION_REFLECT.md (35-security-posture_R.sh ref), session-file-sizes-history.json (80 covenant entries across 50 snapshots). All 388 tests pass. Push blocked by expired GitHub PAT (wq-748).
